name: Sol's Jewelry & Loan
description_short: Sol's Jewelry & Loan is a pawn shop offering collateral-based loans and jewelry/precious metals buying services, located in Omaha, Nebraska.
description_long:
Sol's Jewelry & Loan operates as a pawn shop in Omaha, Nebraska, located at 2505 S 120th St. The business is part of the FirstCash network, a national pawn and financial services company. Based on the Waze listing, the company maintains regular business hours throughout the week to serve customers seeking quick access to cash through collateral-based lending.

As a pawn shop, Sol's Jewelry & Loan provides collateral loans where customers can pledge personal items—particularly jewelry and precious metals—in exchange for immediate cash. This model allows individuals to obtain funds without credit checks or lengthy approval processes. The business also appears to engage in buying and selling jewelry and other valuables, which is typical of pawn operations.

Sol's Jewelry & Loan distinguishes itself through its affiliation with FirstCash, a large national pawn and financial services operator with established processes and multiple locations. The business operates with clear, published hours (9 AM–7 PM weekdays, 9 AM–6 PM Saturday, 11 AM–4 PM Sunday) and provides direct phone contact, indicating professional customer service infrastructure.

For consumers, pawn loans offer speed and accessibility without credit requirements, making them suitable for emergency cash needs. However, customers should understand that pawn loans require surrendering personal property and involve higher effective costs compared to traditional lending. The terms are typically short-term, and failure to repay results in loss of the collateral item.
pros: No credit check required for loans—immediate qualification based on collateral value
Same-day or next-day cash access with minimal paperwork
Clear, published business hours across all seven days of the week
Direct phone contact available (402) 334-8776 for loan inquiries and appraisals
Part of FirstCash network, providing professional pawn operations and established policies
Jewelry and precious metals expertise for accurate appraisals
Located in accessible Omaha neighborhood near major retail and civic centers
cons: Pawn loans carry implicit high costs—interest rates and fees make them more expensive than traditional loans or credit
Loss of collateral if loan is not repaid within agreed timeframe; personal items may be lost permanently
Short-term loan structure (typically 30-90 days) creates risk of repeat borrowing cycles and balloon payments
Limited to collateral-based lending, which excludes those without valuable personal property to pledge
Website content limited to Waze listing; no dedicated company website provided with detailed terms, rates, or policies
best_for: Consumers needing emergency cash within 24 hours who own valuable jewelry or precious metals
Individuals with poor or no credit history seeking loans without credit checks
Short-term borrowers able to repay within 30–90 days who want to avoid traditional lending requirements
diagnosis: Sol's Jewelry & Loan is best for individuals facing genuine short-term cash emergencies who own valuable jewelry or precious metals and cannot access traditional credit. The main caveat is that pawn loans are significantly more expensive than conventional lending and carry the risk of permanent loss of personal property if the loan cannot be repaid.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans secured by jewelry and precious metals
Item storage and security while loan is active
